creator: question+fbsdports@closedsrc.org
text:
On 2008-04-01 20:45 +0000, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of security/base,
>=20
> Please note that PR ports/122332 has just been submitted.
>=20
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/122332

I approve the submitted patch.

--=20
Linh Pham
